title: Chaotic Buckets Mod
description: a mod inspired by Apocalyptic Buckets
body:
Have you ever wanted to flood a Minecraft world? well, this is the mod you want!

This Mod adds chaotic buckets that spill a liquid that spreads left, right, back, forward, and down. Want a fast pool? use the chaotic water bucket.

The water and lava are not the same liquid as regular lava and water, unfortunately. I don't know how to code in basic water or lava to do it specifically only when the bucket places it but I plan on it... (probably in a future update or something).

Acid is in a WIP state (it's most likely going to break certain types of blocks like dirt, grass, or logs) it will lag out your game when you (or anything else) jump inside of it.
Recipes are not fully made yet and can change. (although the buckets are meant to be end-game)

This mod is highly unstable and can ruin your worlds, Be aware of where you place the bucket.
Yes, I know water, lava, and zombi are broken somewhat and I don't know how to fix it...

This mod was made in MCreator.
